## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run i18n:compile && npm run i18n:check` passes (locales in sync)
- [ ] `npm run check` passes (no TypeScript/Astro errors)
- [ ] `npm test` passes — new lesson numbers have a data-reality test
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New i18n keys exist in **every** `messages/*.json`
- [ ] No new dependencies (or: justified below)
